description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in 4Site CMS 2.6 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) login and (2) password parameters to pcgi/4site.pl, (3) page parameter to print/print.shtml, (4) s and (5) i parameters to portfolio/index.shtml, (6) h parameter to hotel/index.php, (7) id parameter to news/news1.shtml, and the (8) th parameter to faq/index.shtml.
